styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents, vertical soot streak, long scorch mark, body-length burn scar, smoke plume, flame, ignition blast, explosion damage, foam strip, insulation strip, orbiter hull damage, fuselage gash, missing thermal tiles, giant patch panel, body opening

cases.prompt_body: Cold machine-in-pad portrait of Challenger from the lower orbiter through the launch platform, right solid rocket booster aft field-joint ring visible below the wing and beside the service structure, the stack remains calm and fully recognizable, one narrow doubled seal band and two short residue crescents stay trapped inside the right booster aft field-joint ring as a routine-looking but wrong history cue, nothing extends below the ring, no smoke, no flame, muted blue-gray air, bone white, restrained launch readiness

Front-right subsystem portrait of the Challenger right solid rocket booster aft field joint with enough orbiter belly, tank edge, and service structure context to keep the shuttle readable, cylindrical booster skin and hardware remain canonical, one off-tone maintenance segment interrupts the otherwise continuous joint band and a small dark crescent stays contained inside that segment, no vertical mark, no orbiter-body damage, no smoke release, pale blue-gray dawn, restrained industrial calm
